untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle pattern requires multi-week structural analysis (cup duration 7-65 weeks, U-shape vs V-shape discrimination, handle geometry). Available indicators operate on daily bars and cannot reliably identify: (1) the distinct U-shaped cup formation over 7+ weeks, (2) handle length measurement from right cup lip, (3) confirmation that handle is >7 days but cup is >7 weeks. Pattern requires chart pattern recognition beyond bar-by-bar indicator logic.
